contents:
(** ** Iteration of equivalences *)

(** *** Iteration by arbitrary integers *)

Definition binint_iter {A} (f : A -> A) `{!IsEquiv f} (n : BinInt) : A -> A
  := match n with
      | neg n => fun x => pos_iter f^-1 n x
      | zero => idmap
      | pos n => fun x => pos_iter f n x
     end.
(** Iteration by arbitrary integers requires the endofunction to be an equivalence, so that we can define a negative iteration by using its inverse. *)

goals.conclusion: binint_iter f (binint_succ n) a = f (binint_iter f n a)
binint_iter f (binint_succ n) a = f (binint_iter f n a)
binint_iter f (binint_succ (neg n)) a = f (binint_iter f (neg n) a)
binint_iter f (binint_succ (pos n)) a = f (binint_iter f (pos n) a)
binint_iter f (binint_succ (neg n)) a = f (binint_iter f (neg n) a)

forall (n : Pos) (f : A -> A) (H : IsEquiv f) (a : A),
binint_iter f (binint_succ (neg n)) a = f (binint_iter f (neg n) a)

(fun p : Pos =>
 forall (f : A -> A) (H : IsEquiv f) (a : A),
 binint_iter f (binint_succ (neg p)) a = f (binint_iter f (neg p) a)) 1%pos

forall p : Pos,
(fun p0 : Pos =>
 forall (f : A -> A) (H : IsEquiv f) (a : A),
 binint_iter f (binint_succ (neg p0)) a = f (binint_iter f (neg p0) a)) p ->
(fun p0 : Pos =>
 forall (f : A -> A) (H : IsEquiv f) (a : A),
 binint_iter f (binint_succ (neg p0)) a = f (binint_iter f (neg p0) a))
  (pos_succ p)

(fun p : Pos =>
 forall (f : A -> A) (H : IsEquiv f) (a : A),
 binint_iter f (binint_succ (neg p)) a = f (binint_iter f (neg p) a)) 1%pos
binint_iter f (binint_succ (-1)%binint) a = f (binint_iter f (-1)%binint a)
f (binint_iter f (-1)%binint a) = binint_iter f (binint_succ (-1)%binint) a

forall p : Pos,
(fun p0 : Pos =>
 forall (f : A -> A) (H : IsEquiv f) (a : A),
 binint_iter f (binint_succ (neg p0)) a = f (binint_iter f (neg p0) a)) p ->
(fun p0 : Pos =>
 forall (f : A -> A) (H : IsEquiv f) (a : A),
 binint_iter f (binint_succ (neg p0)) a = f (binint_iter f (neg p0) a))
  (pos_succ p)

contents: hnf; intros n p f H a.

goals.conclusion:
binint_iter f (binint_succ (neg (pos_succ n))) a =
f (binint_iter f (neg (pos_succ n)) a)

hypotheses.type:
forall (f0 : A -> A) (H0 : IsEquiv f0) (a0 : A),
binint_iter f0 (binint_succ (neg n)) a0 = f0 (binint_iter f0 (neg n) a0)

goals.conclusion: binint_succ (neg (pos_succ n)) = ?Goal0

hypotheses.type:
forall (f0 : A -> A) (H0 : IsEquiv f0) (a0 : A),
binint_iter f0 (binint_succ (neg n)) a0 = f0 (binint_iter f0 (neg n) a0)

goals.conclusion: binint_iter f ?Goal0 a = f (binint_iter f (neg (pos_succ n)) a)

hypotheses.type:
forall (f0 : A -> A) (H0 : IsEquiv f0) (a0 : A),
binint_iter f0 (binint_succ (neg n)) a0 = f0 (binint_iter f0 (neg n) a0)

goals.conclusion: binint_succ (binint_pred (neg n)) = ?Goal0

hypotheses.type:
forall (f0 : A -> A) (H0 : IsEquiv f0) (a0 : A),
binint_iter f0 (binint_succ (neg n)) a0 = f0 (binint_iter f0 (neg n) a0)

goals.conclusion: binint_iter f ?Goal0 a = f (binint_iter f (neg (pos_succ n)) a)

hypotheses.type:
forall (f0 : A -> A) (H0 : IsEquiv f0) (a0 : A),
binint_iter f0 (binint_succ (neg n)) a0 = f0 (binint_iter f0 (neg n) a0)

goals.conclusion: binint_iter f (neg n) a = f (binint_iter f (neg (pos_succ n)) a)

hypotheses.type:
forall (f0 : A -> A) (H0 : IsEquiv f0) (a0 : A),
binint_iter f0 (binint_succ (neg n)) a0 = f0 (binint_iter f0 (neg n) a0)

goals.conclusion: f^-1 (binint_iter f (neg n) a) = binint_iter f (neg (pos_succ n)) a

hypotheses.type:
forall (f0 : A -> A) (H0 : IsEquiv f0) (a0 : A),
binint_iter f0 (binint_succ (neg n)) a0 = f0 (binint_iter f0 (neg n) a0)

goals.conclusion: pos_iter f^-1 (pos_succ n) a = f^-1 (pos_iter f^-1 n a)

hypotheses.type:
forall (f0 : A -> A) (H0 : IsEquiv f0) (a0 : A),
binint_iter f0 (binint_succ (neg n)) a0 = f0 (binint_iter f0 (neg n) a0)

goals.conclusion: binint_iter f (binint_succ (pos n)) a = f (binint_iter f (pos n) a)
pos_iter f (n + 1)%pos a = f (pos_iter f n a)
pos_iter f (pos_succ n) a = f (pos_iter f n a)

contents:
Definition binint_iter_succ_r {A} (f : A -> A) `{IsEquiv _ _ f}
  (n : BinInt) (a : A) : binint_iter f (binint_succ n) a = binint_iter f n (f a).

goals.conclusion: binint_iter f (binint_succ n) a = binint_iter f n (f a)
binint_iter f (binint_succ n) a = binint_iter f n (f a)
binint_iter f (binint_succ (neg n)) a = binint_iter f (neg n) (f a)
binint_iter f (binint_succ (pos n)) a = binint_iter f (pos n) (f a)
binint_iter f (binint_succ (neg n)) a = binint_iter f (neg n) (f a)

forall (n : Pos) (f : A -> A) (H : IsEquiv f) (a : A),
binint_iter f (binint_succ (neg n)) a = binint_iter f (neg n) (f a)

(fun p : Pos =>
 forall (f : A -> A) (H : IsEquiv f) (a : A),
 binint_iter f (binint_succ (neg p)) a = binint_iter f (neg p) (f a)) 1%pos

forall p : Pos,
(fun p0 : Pos =>
 forall (f : A -> A) (H : IsEquiv f) (a : A),
 binint_iter f (binint_succ (neg p0)) a = binint_iter f (neg p0) (f a)) p ->
(fun p0 : Pos =>
 forall (f : A -> A) (H : IsEquiv f) (a : A),
 binint_iter f (binint_succ (neg p0)) a = binint_iter f (neg p0) (f a))
  (pos_succ p)

(fun p : Pos =>
 forall (f : A -> A) (H : IsEquiv f) (a : A),
 binint_iter f (binint_succ (neg p)) a = binint_iter f (neg p) (f a)) 1%pos
binint_iter f (binint_succ (-1)%binint) a = binint_iter f (-1)%binint (f a)
binint_iter f (-1)%binint (f a) = binint_iter f (binint_succ (-1)%binint) a

forall p : Pos,
(fun p0 : Pos =>
 forall (f : A -> A) (H : IsEquiv f) (a : A),
 binint_iter f (binint_succ (neg p0)) a = binint_iter f (neg p0) (f a)) p ->
(fun p0 : Pos =>
 forall (f : A -> A) (H : IsEquiv f) (a : A),
 binint_iter f (binint_succ (neg p0)) a = binint_iter f (neg p0) (f a))
  (pos_succ p)

contents: hnf; intros n p f H a.

goals.conclusion:
binint_iter f (binint_succ (neg (pos_succ n))) a =
binint_iter f (neg (pos_succ n)) (f a)

hypotheses.type:
forall (f0 : A -> A) (H0 : IsEquiv f0) (a0 : A),
binint_iter f0 (binint_succ (neg n)) a0 = binint_iter f0 (neg n) (f0 a0)

goals.conclusion:
binint_iter f (binint_succ (binint_pred (neg n))) a =
binint_iter f (binint_pred (neg n)) (f a)

hypotheses.type:
forall (f0 : A -> A) (H0 : IsEquiv f0) (a0 : A),
binint_iter f0 (binint_succ (neg n)) a0 = binint_iter f0 (neg n) (f0 a0)

goals.conclusion: binint_succ (binint_pred (neg n)) = ?Goal0

hypotheses.type:
forall (f0 : A -> A) (H0 : IsEquiv f0) (a0 : A),
binint_iter f0 (binint_succ (neg n)) a0 = binint_iter f0 (neg n) (f0 a0)

goals.conclusion: binint_iter f ?Goal0 a = binint_iter f (binint_pred (neg n)) (f a)

hypotheses.type:
forall (f0 : A -> A) (H0 : IsEquiv f0) (a0 : A),
binint_iter f0 (binint_succ (neg n)) a0 = binint_iter f0 (neg n) (f0 a0)

goals.conclusion: binint_iter f (neg n) a = binint_iter f (binint_pred (neg n)) (f a)

hypotheses.type:
forall (f0 : A -> A) (H0 : IsEquiv f0) (a0 : A),
binint_iter f0 (binint_succ (neg n)) a0 = binint_iter f0 (neg n) (f0 a0)

goals.conclusion: pos_iter f^-1 n a = pos_iter f^-1 (pos_succ n) (f a)

hypotheses.type:
forall (f0 : A -> A) (H0 : IsEquiv f0) (a0 : A),
binint_iter f0 (binint_succ (neg n)) a0 = binint_iter f0 (neg n) (f0 a0)

goals.conclusion: pos_iter f^-1 n a = pos_iter f^-1 n (f^-1 (f a))

hypotheses.type:
forall (f0 : A -> A) (H0 : IsEquiv f0) (a0 : A),
binint_iter f0 (binint_succ (neg n)) a0 = binint_iter f0 (neg n) (f0 a0)

goals.conclusion: pos_iter f^-1 n a = pos_iter f^-1 n a

hypotheses.type:
forall (f0 : A -> A) (H0 : IsEquiv f0) (a0 : A),
binint_iter f0 (binint_succ (neg n)) a0 = binint_iter f0 (neg n) (f0 a0)

goals.conclusion: binint_iter f (binint_succ (pos n)) a = binint_iter f (pos n) (f a)
pos_iter f (n + 1)%pos a = pos_iter f n (f a)
pos_iter f (pos_succ n) a = pos_iter f n (f a)
binint_iter f (binint_pred n) a = f^-1 (binint_iter f n a)
binint_iter f (binint_pred n) a = f^-1 (binint_iter f n a)
binint_iter f (binint_pred (neg n)) a = f^-1 (binint_iter f (neg n) a)
binint_iter f (binint_pred (pos n)) a = f^-1 (binint_iter f (pos n) a)
binint_iter f (binint_pred (neg n)) a = f^-1 (binint_iter f (neg n) a)
pos_iter f^-1 (pos_succ n) a = f^-1 (pos_iter f^-1 n a)
binint_iter f (binint_pred (pos n)) a = f^-1 (binint_iter f (pos n) a)

forall n : Pos,
binint_iter f (binint_pred (pos n)) a = f^-1 (binint_iter f (pos n) a)

(fun p : Pos =>
 binint_iter f (binint_pred (pos p)) a = f^-1 (binint_iter f (pos p) a))
  1%pos

forall p : Pos,
(fun p0 : Pos =>
 binint_iter f (binint_pred (pos p0)) a = f^-1 (binint_iter f (pos p0) a)) p ->
(fun p0 : Pos =>
 binint_iter f (binint_pred (pos p0)) a = f^-1 (binint_iter f (pos p0) a))
  (pos_succ p)

(fun p : Pos =>
 binint_iter f (binint_pred (pos p)) a = f^-1 (binint_iter f (pos p) a))
  1%pos

forall p : Pos,
(fun p0 : Pos =>
 binint_iter f (binint_pred (pos p0)) a = f^-1 (binint_iter f (pos p0) a)) p ->
(fun p0 : Pos =>
 binint_iter f (binint_pred (pos p0)) a = f^-1 (binint_iter f (pos p0) a))
  (pos_succ p)

binint_iter f (binint_pred (pos (pos_succ p))) a =
f^-1 (binint_iter f (pos (pos_succ p)) a)

hypotheses.type: binint_iter f (binint_pred (pos p)) a = f^-1 (binint_iter f (pos p) a)

goals.conclusion:
binint_iter f (binint_pred (pos (p + 1%pos))) a =
f^-1 (binint_iter f (pos (p + 1%pos)) a)

hypotheses.type: binint_iter f (binint_pred (pos p)) a = f^-1 (binint_iter f (pos p) a)

goals.conclusion:
binint_iter f (binint_pred (binint_succ (pos p))) a =
f^-1 (binint_iter f (pos (p + 1%pos)) a)

hypotheses.type: binint_iter f (binint_pred (pos p)) a = f^-1 (binint_iter f (pos p) a)

goals.conclusion: binint_iter f (pos p) a = f^-1 (binint_iter f (pos (p + 1%pos)) a)

hypotheses.type: binint_iter f (binint_pred (pos p)) a = f^-1 (binint_iter f (pos p) a)

goals.conclusion: binint_iter f (pos p) a = f^-1 (binint_iter f (binint_succ (pos p)) a)

hypotheses.type: binint_iter f (binint_pred (pos p)) a = f^-1 (binint_iter f (pos p) a)

goals.conclusion: binint_iter f (pos p) a = f^-1 (f (binint_iter f (pos p) a))

hypotheses.type: binint_iter f (binint_pred (pos p)) a = f^-1 (binint_iter f (pos p) a)

goals.conclusion: f^-1 (f (binint_iter f (pos p) a)) = binint_iter f (pos p) a

hypotheses.type: binint_iter f (binint_pred (pos p)) a = f^-1 (binint_iter f (pos p) a)

goals.conclusion: binint_iter f (binint_pred n) a = binint_iter f n (f^-1 a)
binint_iter f (binint_pred n) a = binint_iter f n (f^-1 a)

forall (f : A -> A) (H : IsEquiv f) (n : BinInt) (a : A),
binint_iter f (binint_pred n) a = binint_iter f n (f^-1 a)

contents:
destruct n as [n| |n]; trivial;
  induction n as [|n nH] using pos_peano_ind; trivial.

goals.conclusion:
forall a : A,
binint_iter f (binint_pred (neg (pos_succ n))) a =
binint_iter f (neg (pos_succ n)) (f^-1 a)

hypotheses.type:
forall a : A,
binint_iter f (binint_pred (neg n)) a = binint_iter f (neg n) (f^-1 a)

goals.conclusion:
forall a : A,
binint_iter f (binint_pred 1%binint) a = binint_iter f 1%binint (f^-1 a)

forall a : A,
binint_iter f (binint_pred (pos (pos_succ n))) a =
binint_iter f (pos (pos_succ n)) (f^-1 a)

hypotheses.type:
forall a : A,
binint_iter f (binint_pred (pos n)) a = binint_iter f (pos n) (f^-1 a)

goals.conclusion:
forall a : A,
binint_iter f (binint_pred (neg (pos_succ n))) a =
binint_iter f (neg (pos_succ n)) (f^-1 a)

hypotheses.type:
forall a : A,
binint_iter f (binint_pred (neg n)) a = binint_iter f (neg n) (f^-1 a)

goals.conclusion:
forall a : A,
binint_iter f (binint_pred (pos (pos_succ n))) a =
binint_iter f (pos (pos_succ n)) (f^-1 a)

hypotheses.type:
forall a : A,
binint_iter f (binint_pred (pos n)) a = binint_iter f (pos n) (f^-1 a)

goals.conclusion:
forall a : A,
binint_iter f (binint_pred (neg (n + 1)%pos)) a =
binint_iter f (neg (n + 1)%pos) (f^-1 a)

hypotheses.type:
forall a : A,
binint_iter f (binint_pred (neg n)) a = binint_iter f (neg n) (f^-1 a)

goals.conclusion:
forall a : A,
binint_iter f (binint_pred (pos (n + 1%pos))) a =
binint_iter f (pos (n + 1%pos)) (f^-1 a)

hypotheses.type:
forall a : A,
binint_iter f (binint_pred (pos n)) a = binint_iter f (pos n) (f^-1 a)

goals.conclusion:
binint_iter f (binint_pred (neg (n + 1)%pos)) a =
binint_iter f (neg (n + 1)%pos) (f^-1 a)

hypotheses.type:
forall a0 : A,
binint_iter f (binint_pred (neg n)) a0 = binint_iter f (neg n) (f^-1 a0)

goals.conclusion:
binint_iter f (binint_pred (pos (n + 1%pos))) a =
binint_iter f (pos (n + 1%pos)) (f^-1 a)

hypotheses.type:
forall a0 : A,
binint_iter f (binint_pred (pos n)) a0 = binint_iter f (pos n) (f^-1 a0)

goals.conclusion:
binint_iter f (binint_pred (binint_pred (neg n))) a =
binint_iter f (binint_pred (neg n)) (f^-1 a)

hypotheses.type:
forall a0 : A,
binint_iter f (binint_pred (neg n)) a0 = binint_iter f (neg n) (f^-1 a0)

goals.conclusion:
binint_iter f (binint_pred (pos (n + 1%pos))) a =
binint_iter f (pos (n + 1%pos)) (f^-1 a)

hypotheses.type:
forall a0 : A,
binint_iter f (binint_pred (pos n)) a0 = binint_iter f (pos n) (f^-1 a0)

goals.conclusion:
binint_iter f (binint_pred (binint_pred (neg n))) a =
binint_iter f (binint_pred (neg n)) (f^-1 a)

hypotheses.type:
forall a0 : A,
binint_iter f (binint_pred (neg n)) a0 = binint_iter f (neg n) (f^-1 a0)

goals.conclusion:
binint_iter f (binint_pred (binint_succ (pos n))) a =
binint_iter f (binint_succ (pos n)) (f^-1 a)

hypotheses.type:
forall a0 : A,
binint_iter f (binint_pred (pos n)) a0 = binint_iter f (pos n) (f^-1 a0)

goals.conclusion:
binint_iter f (neg (pos_succ (pos_succ n))) a =
binint_iter f (neg (pos_succ n)) (f^-1 a)

hypotheses.type:
forall a0 : A,
binint_iter f (binint_pred (neg n)) a0 = binint_iter f (neg n) (f^-1 a0)

goals.conclusion:
binint_iter f (binint_pred (binint_succ (pos n))) a =
binint_iter f (binint_succ (pos n)) (f^-1 a)

hypotheses.type:
forall a0 : A,
binint_iter f (binint_pred (pos n)) a0 = binint_iter f (pos n) (f^-1 a0)

goals.conclusion:
binint_iter f (binint_pred (binint_succ (pos n))) a =
binint_iter f (binint_succ (pos n)) (f^-1 a)

hypotheses.type:
forall a0 : A,
binint_iter f (binint_pred (pos n)) a0 = binint_iter f (pos n) (f^-1 a0)

goals.conclusion: binint_iter f (pos n) a = binint_iter f (binint_succ (pos n)) (f^-1 a)

hypotheses.type:
forall a0 : A,
binint_iter f (binint_pred (pos n)) a0 = binint_iter f (pos n) (f^-1 a0)

goals.conclusion: binint_iter f (pos n) a = binint_iter f (pos n) (f (f^-1 a))

hypotheses.type:
forall a0 : A,
binint_iter f (binint_pred (pos n)) a0 = binint_iter f (pos n) (f^-1 a0)

goals.conclusion: binint_iter f (pos n) a = binint_iter f (pos n) a

hypotheses.type:
forall a0 : A,
binint_iter f (binint_pred (pos n)) a0 = binint_iter f (pos n) (f^-1 a0)
